headline: Here’s What Raymond James Thinks About Dell Technologies (DELL)
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) is one of the best stocks on the rise to invest in. Raymond James stated that a third-party report emerged about Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) terminating its Enterprise Computing Distribution agreement with Arrow Electronics, adding that while “the termination itself is accurate,” the firm believes the market is “overstating the financial implications […]

headline: O’Reilly Stock Sinks on Report of Possible NAPA Bid
summary: O’Reilly Automotive shares fell following a report that the company is interested in buying Genuine Parts Co.’s NAPA division for $10 billion or more.
